mapper.select: select id, order_no, customer_id, vehicle_id, pickup_time, return_time, daily_rent, total_amount, order_status, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_at from rental_order where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into rental_order (order_no, customer_id, vehicle_id, pickup_time, return_time, daily_rent, total_amount, order_status, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{vehicleId}, #{pickupTime}, #{returnTime}, #{dailyRent}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update rental_order set order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
